prompt: Create a dramatic vertical cyber-glam portrait poster of a stylish young man crouching in the center on a glossy black reflective floor, wearing a bright yellow leather bomber jacket with black cuffs, black shirt, black pants, a wristwatch, and clean white sneakers. His pose is low and confident, one knee raised, one hand resting near his chin as if thinking, with neatly styled dark hair and a partially obscured face. Behind him is one large glowing yellow neon Snapchat ghost outline forming a halo-like backdrop, surrounded by smoky golden mist, sparks, and cinematic haze on a deep black background. Add three visible text/UI elements: 1 large glowing uppercase headline at the top reading DESIGN BY MR. TARIQ, 1 smaller centered name line below it reading MR. TARIQ with thin horizontal gold lines on both sides, and 1 rounded translucent profile card at the bottom left containing a small circular avatar, the name Mr. Tariq, a blue verification checkmark, and the follower count 7K Followers. Use high-contrast black and gold lighting, strong neon bloom, realistic fashion photography, sharp details, reflective floor highlights, smoke curling around the subject, premium social-media banner aesthetic, vertical 3:4 composition.
